name: kernel_info
description: Kernel version, loaded modules, kernel parameters, and hardware info
command: echo '=== Kernel ===' && uname -a && echo '' && echo '--- Hardware ---' && cat /proc/device-tree/model 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo "CPU: $(lscpu 2>/dev/null | grep 'Model name' | cut -d: -f2 | xargs)" && echo "Revision: $(cat /proc/device-tree/system/linux,revision 2>/dev/null | xxd -p 2>/dev/null || cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep Revision | awk '{print $3}')" && echo '' && echo '--- Loaded Modules (top 15) ---' && lsmod | head -16 && echo '' && echo '--- Kernel Command Line ---' && cat /proc/cmdline
